title: Grilled Pork Chops
description: A simple and flavorful grilled pork chops recipe with a hint of zesty flavor. This dish is perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season the pork chops with salt and pepper.
Brush the pork chops with vegetable oil.
Grill the pork chops for 5-6 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F.
Let the pork chops rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the pork chops with a sprinkle of zesty lime zest.
